query_normalized: collectionlora: collecting 50 effects in 1 lora via multi-teacher on-policy distillation computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (a) as it covers the same core mechanism (knowledge distillation, including multi-teacher KD) that the user's CollectionLoRA method builds upon, and criterion (d) as a foundational survey reference that anyone writing about KD-based methods would cite for the distillation framework being applied.
